hero_section.subtitle: Fullstack developer with experience in enterprise platforms, real-time systems, and scalable web, mobile, and wearable applications.

contact_section.title: Let's work together

contact_section.name: Name
contact_section.error_tryag: It could not be sent. Please try again in a few seconds

about_me_section.p1: I'm Jesús Manuel Pérez Guerra. I started programming at the age of 15, and since then I decided to make programming my professional path. I currently work as a Fullstack Developer, creating web, mobile, and wearable device solutions. I also tutor at my university in subjects such as Structured Programming, OOP, Algorithms and Data Structures, mainly in Java for the last two subjects and in C.
about_me_section.p2: Outside of programming, I enjoy music, video games, and I'm currently learning to play the piano.
about_me_section.p3: My goal as a developer is to continue growing professionally, strengthening my skills and learning new ones when necessary. I enjoy solving problems and challenges through programming.

6.name: Soundle
6.description: Wordle-style music game. A snippet of a song is played, and the user must guess what it is. Includes animations, hints, and visual feedback.

8.name: Ruf - Customer Assistance App (iOS)
8.description: App for waiters, cooks, or event/restaurant hosts. Notifies staff of customer requests via alerts and allows reading those notifications.
functionalities: Calculates notification read delay for analytics.
Login with a unique one-time generated key (OTP).

10.name: Flappy Bird
10.description: Flappy Bird game created using Assembly language, with a minimalist design using Raylib and C.

11.name: Baker's Game
11.description: Baker's Game card game, similar to Free Cell.

12.name: EJChat
12.description: EJChat is a real-time chat and posting application that allows users to send and receive messages instantly. It uses WebSockets for real-time communication.

13.name: Ruf - Customer Assistance App (Android)
13.description: App for waiters, cooks, or event/restaurant hosts. Notifies staff of customer requests via alerts and allows viewing and reading those notifications.
functionalities: Calculates notification read delay for analytics.
Login with a unique one-time generated key (OTP).

m4.name: Gruas GZ - Inventory Management App
m4.description: Mobile CRM for vehicle inventory control in a towing company. Backend built with Node/Express + MySQL, deployed on a Linux server using PM2.
